User.title: User Profile
User.description: Represents a user's profile data stored in Firestore.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user account was created.

Property.title: Property
Property.description: Represents a rental property managed within the application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Property entity.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this property.

address.description: The structured address of the property.

nameOrNumber.description: The name or number of the building/property.

propertyType.description: Type of property (e.g., flat, house, bungalow, maisonette, studio, HMO).

status.description: Status of the property (e.g., vacant, occupied, under maintenance).

bedrooms.description: Number of bedrooms in the property.

bathrooms.description: Number of bathrooms in the property.

tenancy.description: Financial details related to the property's tenancy.

depositAmount.description: The total security deposit amount held.

depositScheme.description: The name of the deposit protection scheme used.

Tenant.title: Tenant
Tenant.description: Represents a tenant renting a property.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Tenant entity.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns the property associated with this tenant.

propertyId.description: The ID of the property this tenant is associated with.

notes.description: Additional notes about the tenant or tenancy.

status.description: The status of the tenant (e.g., Active, Archived).

MaintenanceLog.title: MaintenanceLog
MaintenanceLog.description: Represents a maintenance log entry for a property.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MaintenanceLog entity.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this maintenance log.

title.description: A concise title for the maintenance issue.

category.description: The category of the maintenance issue.

priority.description: Priority level of the maintenance issue.

reportedBy.description: Name of the person who reported the issue.

reportedDate.description: Date when the maintenance issue was reported.

contractorPhone.description: Phone number of the assigned contractor.

scheduledDate.description: The date the work is scheduled for.

estimatedCost.description: The estimated cost of the repair.

photoUrls.description: An array of URLs for photos of the maintenance issue.

notes.description: Additional notes about the maintenance log.

status.description: The current status of the maintenance task (e.g., Open, In Progress, Complete).

Inspection.title: Inspection
Inspection.description: Represents a scheduled inspection for a property.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Inspection entity.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this inspection.

scheduledDate.description: Date and time the inspection is scheduled for.

type.description: The type of inspection (e.g., Single-Let, HMO).

status.description: The status of the inspection (e.g., Scheduled, Completed).

Document.title: Document
Document.description: Represents a document associated with a property.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Document entity.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this document.

documentType.description: Type of the document (e.g. Tenancy Agreement, EPC).

fileName.description: The original name of the uploaded file.

Expense.title: Expense
Expense.description: Represents an expense related to a property.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Expense entity.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this expense log.

expenseType.description: Category of the expense (e.g., Repairs, Utilities).

paidBy.description: Who paid for the expense (e.g., Landlord, Tenant).

RentPayment.title: RentPayment
RentPayment.description: Represents a rent payment record for a specific month for a property.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this rent payment record.

year.description: The year of the rent payment.

month.description: The month of the rent payment (e.g., 'January').

amountPaid.description: The amount actually paid for the month.

expectedAmount.description: The rent amount expected for the month.

TenantScreening.title: TenantScreening
TenantScreening.description: Represents a tenant screening and background check record.

id.description: Unique identifier for the screening record.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this screening record.

tenantId.description: The ID of the tenant this screening record is associated with.

screeningDate.description: The date the screening was conducted.

overallNotes.description: Overall summary and decision of the screening process.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this contractor entry.

name.description: Name of the contractor or company.

status.description: The status of the contractor (e.g., Active, Archived).

PreTenancyChecklist.title: Pre-Tenancy Checklist
PreTenancyChecklist.description: A checklist for legal and recommended tasks before a tenancy begins.

howToRentGuide.description: Provided the latest 'How to Rent' guide.

epc.description: Energy Performance Certificate (EPC) is valid (min E).

eicr.description: Electrical Installation Condition Report (EICR) is valid.

tenancyAgreement.description: Tenancy Agreement is signed by all parties.

rightToRent.description: Right to Rent check completed and recorded.

schemeLeaflet.description: Provided the relevant deposit scheme leaflet.

protectionCertificate.description: Deposit protection certificate is valid and provided.

keysRecord.description: Record of keys issued to tenant.

emergencyContacts.description: Provided emergency and repairs contact details.

definition.description: Collection to store user-related data.  Security rules will enforce that only the authenticated user can access their own document. This path contains user profile information.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

definition.description: Collection to store rental property information. This collection contains properties that are managed within the application.

params.name: propertyId
params.description: The unique identifier for the property.

definition.description: Subcollection to store maintenance logs for each property. This provides a clear hierarchy for managing maintenance records related to a specific property.

params.name: propertyId
params.description: The unique identifier for the property.

params.name: maintenanceLogId
params.description: The unique identifier for the maintenance log entry.

definition.description: Subcollection to store inspection schedules for each property.  Maintains inspection records specific to a property, aiding in organized tracking.

params.name: propertyId
params.description: The unique identifier for the property.

params.name: inspectionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the inspection.

definition.description: Subcollection to store documents related to each property. Provides structured storage for property-related documents.

params.name: propertyId
params.description: The unique identifier for the property.

params.name: documentId
params.description: The unique identifier for the document.

definition.description: Subcollection to store expenses for each property.

params.name: propertyId
params.description: The unique identifier for the property.

params.name: expenseId
params.description: The unique identifier for the expense.

definition.description: Subcollection to store rent payment status for each property and month.

params.name: propertyId
params.description: The unique identifier for the property.

params.name: rentPaymentId
params.description: The unique identifier for the rent payment, formatted as YYYY-Month.

definition.description: Subcollection to store pre-tenancy checklists for each property.
Collection to store tenant information.  Stores details about tenants renting properties managed within the application.

params.name: tenantId
params.description: The unique identifier for the tenant.

definition.description: Subcollection to store tenant screening records for each tenant.
Collection to store contractor information. Security rules will enforce that only the owner can manage their own list of contractors.

params.name: contractorId
params.description: The unique identifier for the contractor.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure is designed to manage rental properties, tenants, maintenance logs, inspections, and documents. The top-level collections are `properties`, `tenants`, `contractors` and `users/{userId}`. The subcollections `maintenanceLogs`, `inspections`, and `documents` are nested under each `property` to ensure data locality and facilitate querying related information. This structure leverages path-based ownership for user-specific data (e.g., properties owned by a user), which simplifies security rules. The design prioritizes Authorization Independence (CRITICAL) by avoiding hierarchical authorization dependencies (`get()`).  All collections are designed to support QAPs, as listing operations will be secured by path-based rules and potentially by filtering on denormalized fields, ensuring that users can only access data they are authorized to view.
